'''鈭歷-t-ch''' ('''vatacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:puft|puft]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:puft|puft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-t-ch
|-
! Lemma
| vatacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vatachithi|vatachithi]] || [[word:vatachiji|vatachiji]] || [[word:vatachishi|vatachishi]] || [[word:vatachi|vatachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatachuthuth|vatachuthuth]] || [[word:vatachujuj|vatachujuj]] || [[word:vatachushush|vatachushush]] || [[word:vatach|vatach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatachuthu|vatachuthu]] || [[word:vatachuju|vatachuju]] || [[word:vatachushu|vatachushu]] || [[word:vatachu|vatachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatachufuth|vatachufuth]] || [[word:vatachufuj|vatachufuj]] || [[word:vatachufush|vatachufush]] || [[word:vatachuf|vatachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vatachethe|vatachethe]] || [[word:vatacheje|vatacheje]] || [[word:vatacheshe|vatacheshe]] || [[word:vatache|vatache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatachothoth|vatachothoth]] || [[word:vatachojoj|vatachojoj]] || [[word:vatachoshosh|vatachoshosh]] || [[word:vatach|vatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatachotho|vatachotho]] || [[word:vatachojo|vatachojo]] || [[word:vatachosho|vatachosho]] || [[word:vatacho|vatacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatachofoth|vatachofoth]] || [[word:vatachofoj|vatachofoj]] || [[word:vatachofosh|vatachofosh]] || [[word:vatachof|vatachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vatach忙th忙|vatach忙th忙]] || [[word:vatach忙j忙|vatach忙j忙]] || [[word:vatach忙sh忙|vatach忙sh忙]] || [[word:vatach忙|vatach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatachathath|vatachathath]] || [[word:vatachajaj|vatachajaj]] || [[word:vatachashash|vatachashash]] || [[word:vatach|vatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatachatha|vatachatha]] || [[word:vatachaja|vatachaja]] || [[word:vatachasha|vatachasha]] || [[word:vatacha|vatacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatachafath|vatachafath]] || [[word:vatachafaj|vatachafaj]] || [[word:vatachafash|vatachafash]] || [[word:vatachaf|vatachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vatachasha|vatachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govatachasha|govatachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivatachasha|gokivatachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vatachn眉sha|vatachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govatachnkn眉sha|govatachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivatachn眉sha|gokivatachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vatachsh毛sha|vatachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govatachnksh毛sha|govatachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivatachsh毛sha|gokivatachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vatachrosha|vatachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govatachnkrosha|govatachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivatachrosha|gokivatachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vatachmusha|vatachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govatachnkmusha|govatachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatachmusha|gokivatachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vatachsherasha|vatachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govatachnksherasha|govatachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivatachsherasha|gokivatachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vatachngasha|vatachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govatachnkngasha|govatachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivatachngasha|gokivatachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vatachyasha|vatachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govatachnkyasha|govatachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivatachyasha|gokivatachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vatachyamasha|vatachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govatachnkyamasha|govatachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivatachyamasha|gokivatachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vatachn眉sh毛sha|vatachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govatachnkn眉sh毛sha|govatachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivatachn眉sh毛sha|gokivatachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vatachn眉rosha|vatachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govatachnkn眉rosha|govatachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivatachn眉rosha|gokivatachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatachn眉musha|vatachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govatachnkn眉musha|govatachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatachn眉musha|gokivatachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vatachsh毛n眉sha|vatachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govatachnksh毛n眉sha|govatachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivatachsh毛n眉sha|gokivatachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vatachsh毛rosha|vatachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govatachnksh毛rosha|govatachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivatachsh毛rosha|gokivatachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatachsh毛musha|vatachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govatachnksh毛musha|govatachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatachsh毛musha|gokivatachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vatachron眉sha|vatachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govatachnkron眉sha|govatachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivatachron眉sha|gokivatachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vatachrosh毛sha|vatachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govatachnkrosh毛sha|govatachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivatachrosh毛sha|gokivatachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatachromusha|vatachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govatachnkromusha|govatachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatachromusha|gokivatachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vatachmun眉sha|vatachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govatachnkmun眉sha|govatachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivatachmun眉sha|gokivatachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vatachmush毛sha|vatachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govatachnkmush毛sha|govatachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivatachmush毛sha|gokivatachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vatachmurosha|vatachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govatachnkmurosha|govatachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivatachmurosha|gokivatachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vatach|vatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:v忙t忙ch|v忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovatach|hovatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hov忙t忙ch|hov忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovatach|hohovatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohov忙t忙ch|hohov忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉vatach|n眉vatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉v忙t忙ch|n眉v忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉vatach|n眉n眉vatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉v忙t忙ch|n眉n眉v忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂vatach|n茂vatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂v忙t忙ch|n茂v忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂vatach|n茂n茂vatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂v忙t忙ch|n茂n茂v忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvatach|luvatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luv忙t忙ch|luv忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvatach|luluvatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluv忙t忙ch|luluv忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livatach|livatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liv忙t忙ch|liv忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivatach|lilivatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliv忙t忙ch|liliv忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovatach|kovatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kov忙t忙ch|kov忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovatach|kokovatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokov忙t忙ch|kokov忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevatach|kevatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kev忙t忙ch|kev忙t忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevatach|kekevatach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekev忙t忙ch|kekev忙t忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
